_comment: Music source map for in-battle BGM. The .ogg tracks are now vendored under public/assets/music/<id>.ogg (000..190), so BGM loads entirely from local assets — no network fetch. A track id N resolves to `${id padded to `pad` digits}.ogg`. cdnBaseUrl/remoteBaseUrl are left empty: the remote hosts were unreachable on many networks, so the tracks were bundled instead. Re-add a base URL only if you want a remote fallback again.
